mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.user_num AS userNum, r.movie_id AS movieId, r.ratting AS rating, r.content AS content, u.nickname AS nickname, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reviews r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_num = u.user_num WHERE r.movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( user_num, movie_id, ratting, content, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userNum}, #{movieId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
